name: EDPB-guidelines-AI-GDPR-interplay
description: European Data Protection Board publicerar slutliga riktlinjer om AI-förordningen och GDPR-samspelet. EDPB Guidelines är formellt guidance men har de facto bindande verkan för DPAs. EU jurisdiction.
beforeHtml:
European Data Protection Board

Guidelines, Recommendations, Best Practices

The EDPB issues guidelines, recommendations and best practices to promote a common understanding of EU data protection law. Draft guidelines undergo public consultation before being adopted in final form.

Recently adopted

Guidelines 03/2025 on Personal Data Breach Notification
Version 2.0 · Adopted 2025-12-10
Guidelines 01/2025 on International Data Transfers
Version 1.0 · Adopted 2025-09-18
afterHtml:
European Data Protection Board

Guidelines, Recommendations, Best Practices

The EDPB issues guidelines, recommendations and best practices to promote a common understanding of EU data protection law. Draft guidelines undergo public consultation before being adopted in final form.

Recently adopted

Guidelines 02/2026 on the Interplay between the AI Act and the GDPR
Version 1.0 — Adopted 2026-04-12

These final Guidelines clarify how controllers deploying high-risk AI systems under the AI Act must satisfy concurrent obligations under the GDPR, including: legal basis for processing training data, data subject rights when model outputs affect individuals, transparency obligations, and DPIA requirements for AI systems processing special categories of data. The Guidelines reflect changes made in response to the public consultation held between September 2025 and January 2026 and are immediately applicable by supervisory authorities.
Guidelines 03/2025 on Personal Data Breach Notification
Version 2.0 · Adopted 2025-12-10
Guidelines 01/2025 on International Data Transfers
Version 1.0 · Adopted 2025-09-18
